name: Future-State Encoder Planner
blurb: Local non-record evidence package for a 1xH100 SP1024 recurrent GQA run with prefix-hybrid macro routing, explicit future-state encoder targets, latent planner conditioning, future-embed MTP head, meta-preconditioning, bigram-prior signals, turbo4_aol Muon geometry, and int4+zlib roundtrip export. Final exact int4+zlib roundtrip val_bpb is 1.39784304 under the 16MB artifact cap.
